leadText: The Black Apricorn (Japanese: くろぼんぐり Black Bonguri), formatted Blk Apricorn prior to Generation VI, is a type of Apricorn introduced in Generation II. It can be used to make a Heavy Ball.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Black Apricorn can be made into a Heavy Ball by Kurt . If used in the Apriblender , it can produce Aprijuice that boosts the Power and Stamina Performance stats.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A black Apricorn . HG SS B W B2 W2 A black Apricorn It has an indescribable scent. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A black Apricorn. It has a scent beyond one's experience. S V A black Apricorn. It has a smell that cannot be captured in words.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Bitter Berry trees in Generation II are replaced by Black Apricorn trees in Generation IV .
